_note: Config for the ai-system pipeline (see ai-system/orchestrator). lint and test are DIFF-SCOPED via the {files} token: they only check the files a run changed, so duo-decide's pre-existing repo-wide debt (eslint error in generated expo-env.d.ts; 1 failing jest test; tsc errors in Supabase types + Deno edge fns) doesn't poison the code loop. prettier is scoped too so generated output matches the project's tab style. typecheck is OPTED OUT (explicit { command:'', optOut } form — the T1 code-stage preflight now fails a bare empty command): tsc is project-wide, can't be {files}-scoped, and the repo has pre-existing type debt. Re-enable once the repo is green.
